assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets Authentication.CookieLifetime to 8 hours and Authentication.CookieSlidingExpiration to false
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md documents `options.Authentication.CookieLifetime` as the mechanism for session lifetime and mentions CookieSlidingExpiration.
SKILL.md explicitly shows `options.Authentication.CoordinateClientLifetimesWithUserSession = true` as a required step for inactivity timeout.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddServerSideSessions() on the IdentityServer builder
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md clearly states server-side sessions must be enabled for inactivity timeout to work.

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has BackChannelLogoutUri set to 'https://app.example.com/bff/backchannel'
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md discusses back-channel logout configuration with BackChannelLogoutUri on clients.

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has AccessTokenLifetime set to 300 (5 minutes)
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md explicitly states 'access token lifetime must be shorter than session timeout' and the prompt specifies 5 minutes = 300 seconds.
